pr.title: Docs: add Claudexia as OpenAI-compatible LLM provider
pr.body:
This PR adds documentation for [Claudexia](https://claudexia.tech), a pay-per-token gateway that exposes Anthropic Claude and OpenAI GPT models through an OpenAI-compatible API. Aider already works with it out of the box via `OPENAI_API_BASE` + `--model openai/...`; this just documents how.

**Files added:**
- `aider/website/docs/llms/claudexia.md` — provider page following the same template as `deepseek.md` / `openrouter.md` (frontmatter, env-var bash blocks, model examples).

No code or model-list changes — pure docs.

Link: https://claudexia.tech
pr.author: SeMax1337
